{{Missing Info|specifics=<br> Source}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Orochi-chan's Scale
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source="one of the ninja events"
|description=On the inverted scales under the Orochi-chan's neck, you can sense the divine flowing light with a faint sound of wind and thunder. The essence of its whole body is concentrated on the spot. Even its close ones may be severy harmed if they accidentally touch scale.
|fame=14
|art=16
|fth=29
|civ=15
|tech=16
|ss1=Orochi-chan HARD Stats +1%
|ss2=Orochi-chan HARD Stats +2%
|ss3=Orochi-chan HARD Stats +3%
}}
[[Category:HARD Stat Boosts]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
